title: PIM Activator managed configuration
description: Pushed by Edge enterprise policy (Intune / Group Policy / Group Policy registry). When present, the extension uses these values instead of config.js.

groupNameFilter.title: Regex limiting which eligible groups are shown
groupNameFilter.description: Default: ^PIM- (matches the PIM4EntraPS naming convention). Use .* to show all eligible groups.

defaultDurationHours.title: Default activation duration in hours (1-24; use integer values only)

defaultJustification.title: Default text for the justification field

entraGroupRegex.title: Regex matching groups that grant Entra (M365) admin roles
entraGroupRegex.description: JavaScript regex (case-insensitive) used to bucket groups in the popup's 'Entra' section on both Activate + My Access tabs. Default 'Entra' matches PIM-Entra-*, MyOrg-Entra-Admins, etc. Override to match your naming convention (e.g. 'AAD-Admin' if you use that prefix).

azureGroupRegex.title: Regex matching groups that grant Azure RBAC roles
azureGroupRegex.description: JavaScript regex (case-insensitive) used to bucket groups in the popup's 'Azure RBAC' section. Default '(AzRes|Azure)' matches PIM-AzRes-*, *-Azure-*, etc. Override to match your naming convention.
